title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: September 8, 2022
summary: September 8, 2022: Over the past week, the sea ice has now decreased by a lower rate from last week of 3.48% , from the level on 09/01/2022 of 5.026 M km 2 to 4 .851 M km 2 for this week. Perhaps the slow-up of the past couple of weeks is a harbinger that we are really close to bottoming out for the...

title: Advancing Advocacy Potential for Bering Strait Region Tribal Members
summary: Indigenous voices need amplification as our home, the Arctic, faces unprecedented changes that are already having substantial impacts on the lands and waters where we live and eat. Governing bodies are making decisions without input from our communities; they haven’t experienced the impact of a poor fishing season, or an inability to continue cultural practices passed down from generations. Our voices a...

title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 5 September, 2022
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 5 September, 2022 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
